purpose: Codex 또는 앱 개발에서 바로 사용할 수 있는 여행 영어 학습 데이터입니다.
notes: pronunciationKoShort/pronunciationKoLong은 초보자를 위한 한글 발음 보조입니다.
실제 발음·억양 연습 앱에서는 audioTextShort/audioTextLong을 Web Speech API, TTS, STT 평가에 사용하세요.
최종 HTML 파일 변환 시 shortEnglish는 검정, longEnglish는 진한 회색으로 표시하는 것을 권장합니다.

items.pronunciationKoLong: 쿠드 유 tell me 왓 타임 it starts?
items.audioTextLong: Could you tell me what time it starts?

items.longEnglish: Could you tell me what time it ends?
items.koreanLong: 몇 시에 끝나는지 알려주실 수 있나요?
items.pronunciationKoLong: 쿠드 유 tell me 왓 타임 it ends?
items.audioTextLong: Could you tell me what time it ends?

items.longEnglish: It starts at three in the afternoon.
items.pronunciationKoLong: It starts at 쓰리 in the afternoon.
items.audioTextLong: It starts at three in the afternoon.

items.longEnglish: I’ll come back around 3 p.m.
items.pronunciationKoShort: 아일 come back at 쓰리 피엠
items.pronunciationKoLong: 아일 come back around 쓰리 피엠
items.audioTextLong: I’ll come back around 3 p.m.

items.longEnglish: It takes about ten minutes.
items.pronunciationKoLong: It takes about 텐 minutes.
items.audioTextLong: It takes about ten minutes.

items.shortEnglish: I’ll be there in ten minutes.
items.longEnglish: I’ll be there in about ten minutes.
items.pronunciationKoShort: 아일 be there in 텐 minutes.
items.pronunciationKoLong: 아일 be there in about 텐 minutes.
items.audioTextShort: I’ll be there in ten minutes.
items.audioTextLong: I’ll be there in about ten minutes.

items.longEnglish: Could you tell me how much it is?
items.pronunciationKoLong: 쿠드 유 tell me 하우 머치 it is?
items.audioTextLong: Could you tell me how much it is?

items.longEnglish: Could you tell me how much the ticket is?
items.koreanLong: 티켓 가격이 얼마인지 알려주실 수 있나요?
items.pronunciationKoLong: 쿠드 유 tell me 하우 머치 the 티켓 is?
items.audioTextLong: Could you tell me how much the ticket is?

items.longEnglish: Could you tell me how much the fare is?
items.pronunciationKoLong: 쿠드 유 tell me 하우 머치 the 페어 is?
items.audioTextLong: Could you tell me how much the fare is?

items.longEnglish: Is the tax included in the price?

items.longEnglish: Is the service charge included?

items.longEnglish: Is there any extra charge?
items.pronunciationKoLong: Is there any extra 차지?
items.audioTextLong: Is there any extra charge?

items.longEnglish: It costs ten dollars.

items.audioTextLong: It costs ten dollars.

items.longEnglish: It costs twenty euros.
items.pronunciationKoLong: It costs 트웬티 유로즈.
items.audioTextLong: It costs twenty euros.

items.longEnglish: It costs one thousand yen.
items.pronunciationKoLong: It costs 원 싸우전드 엔.

items.longEnglish: It costs ten thousand yen.
items.pronunciationKoLong: It costs 텐 싸우전드 엔.
items.audioTextLong: It costs ten thousand yen.

items.longEnglish: What day is it today?

items.audioTextLong: What day is it today?

items.longEnglish: I have a reservation for tomorrow.
items.pronunciationKoLong: I have a 레저베이션 for tomorrow.
items.audioTextLong: I have a reservation for tomorrow.

items.longEnglish: I arrived this morning.
items.pronunciationKoLong: I arrived this morning.
items.audioTextLong: I arrived this morning.

items.longEnglish: I’ll be staying here until Friday.
items.pronunciationKoLong: 아일 be staying here until 프라이데이.

items.longEnglish: I’ll be leaving on Sunday.

items.audioTextLong: I’ll be leaving on Sunday.

items.longEnglish: My gate is Gate 12.

items.shortEnglish: Can you say it again slowly?
